finding: Diffuse Bone Marrow Abnormalities in Childhood

differentials.name: REPLACED BY TUMOR CELLS (a)  metastatic disease
differentials.raw: REPLACED BY TUMOR CELLS (a)  metastatic disease

differentials.name: REPLACED BY RED CELLS =  red cell hyperplasia = reconversion (a)  severe anemia: sickle cell disease, thalassemia, hereditary spherocytosis (b)  chronic severe blood loss (c)  marrow replacement by neoplasia (d)  treatment with granulocyte-macrophage colony stimulating factor
